stories: Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the 3rd of April, 2026
Here's a quick fact to start the day: honey never spoils
Archaeologists have found 3,000-year-old honey inside Egyptian pharaohs' tombs, and it was still perfectly edible
Your calendar is looking clear today вЂ” a good chance to ease into the long Easter weekend ahead
Over here in Singapore, the Middle East conflict is starting to land closer to home
The Ministry of Foreign Affairs is actively surveying Singaporeans based in the region, assessing who may need help getting out as airport closures escalate across parts of the Middle East
Meanwhile, MINDEF has confirmed a significant defence purchase вЂ” guided multiple launch rocket systems acquired from the United States
And if you're filling the tank this weekend, expect to pay more: petrol prices have been climbing steadily as the Strait of Hormuz crisis chokes global oil supply
Good morning Sean, it's Friday, April 3, 2026 ГўВЂВ” and a Happy Good Friday to you
Here's what you need to know before the long weekend begins
Here's your Friday fact: the jellyfish species Turritopsis dohrnii is biologically immortal
When stressed or aging, it can reverse its own cellular development back to an early larval stage ГўВЂВ” essentially hitting the rewind button on life
Scientists believe it could hold clues to understanding cellular ageing in humans
Not bad for something you can barely see with the naked eye
Your calendar looks clear today ГўВЂВ” it is Good Friday, after all
From April 1, the government officially extended shared parental leave from 6 weeks to 10 weeks ГўВЂВ” a meaningful step forward for working families
